score_range_label.zh: 中等确信度 (50-69) — 改善中

condition.en: Tightening but Decelerating, Inflection in 4-6 Weeks
condition.zh: 紧缩但减速，拐点 4-6 周内

summary.en: The worst of the liquidity shock is behind us. TGA growth decelerated sharply from +$227B to +$82.7B — the seasonal tax-season peak is almost certainly in. The Fed repo lending facility collapsed from $10.5B to $4M, confirming the acute funding stress has fully resolved. SOFR is stable. The structural headwind ($388B three-week drain) has not reversed, but the path to mid-May TGA unwind is now clear. Net liquidity at $5.700T needs to recover toward $5.9T+ before adding aggressively. The DOJ dropping the Powell investigation removed the political risk premium. The inflection point — when TGA begins its seasonal unwind and net liquidity starts recovering — is 4-6 weeks away.
summary.zh: 流动性冲击最猛烈的阶段已经过去。TGA 增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降至 +827 亿美元——税季顶部几乎可以确认。美联储 repo 借贷工具从 105 亿美元崩溃至 400 万美元，确认急性融资压力已完全解除。SOFR 稳定。结构性逆风（三周 3880 亿美元抽水）尚未逆转，但 5 月中旬 TGA 回落的路径现在清晰。净流动性 5.700 万亿美元需要回升至 5.9 万亿美元以上才能积极加仓。DOJ 撤销 Powell 调查消除了政治风险溢价。拐点——TGA 开始季节性回落、净流动性开始恢复——距离 4-6 周。

fed_balance_sheet_change.zh: +17 亿美元（周环比）——接近持平

rrp_note.en: Effectively zero — no liquidity buffer remaining
rrp_note.zh: 实际归零——无流动性缓冲

tga_note.en: +$82.7B WoW — growth rate slowed sharply from +$227B; peak signal confirmed
tga_note.zh: 周环比 +827 亿美元——增速从 +2270 亿美元骤降；见顶信号明确

net_liquidity_change.zh: -820 亿美元（周环比）/ -3880 亿美元（三周）——抽水显著减速

details.en: Key positive development: TGA growth decelerated from +$227B to +$82.7B — the tax-season surge is ending. The TGA should peak within 1-2 weeks and begin the seasonal unwind, adding $200-300B back to net liquidity by mid-May. Repo lending at $4M confirms no acute stress. Bank reserves at $2.915T remain below $3T threshold but are not deteriorating further. SOFR is stable. The structural tightening continues but the trajectory is improving. The next H.4.1 data release will be critical to confirm TGA peak.
details.zh: 关键正面进展：TGA 增速从 +2270 亿美元降至 +827 亿美元——税季冲击正在结束。TGA 应在 1-2 周内见顶并开始季节性回落，在 5 月中旬前向净流动性补充 2000-3000 亿美元。Repo 借贷 400 万美元确认无急性压力。银行准备金 2.915 万亿美元仍低于 3 万亿美元门槛，但没有进一步恶化。SOFR 稳定。结构性紧缩持续，但轨迹在改善。下一次 H.4.1 数据发布将是确认 TGA 见顶的关键。

reason.en: Score improved from 45 to 48. TGA growth rate halved (+$82.7B vs +$227B), repo lending zeroed out ($4M), SOFR stable. The acute phase of the tax-season drain is over. The structural $388B three-week drain remains, but the inflection point (TGA peak + unwind) is now 1-2 weeks away. Score at 48 — approaching neutral but not yet there because the drain hasn't reversed, only slowed. Next week's H.4.1 data is the key confirmation.
reason.zh: 分数从 45 升至 48。TGA 增速减半（+827 亿美元 vs +2270 亿美元），repo lending 归零（400 万美元），SOFR 稳定。税季抽水的急性阶段已过。结构性 3880 亿美元三周抽水仍在，但拐点（TGA 见顶 + 回落）现在距离 1-2 周。分数 48——接近中性但尚未达到，因为抽水尚未逆转，只是减速。下周 H.4.1 数据是关键确认。

status.en: Strong — AI Hardware Validated, Consensus Rising
status.zh: 强劲——AI 硬件验证，共识上调

reason.en: Score improved from 62 to 68. Intel's best single day since 1987 (+23.65%), AMD +13.91%, NVIDIA +4.33% — AI hardware demand is validated. Overall beat rate 88%, average beat magnitude +13%, NTM EPS revised up +1.1%, full-year growth consensus rising to 18%. Credit spreads (HY OAS 285bps) at 2021 lows confirm no credit stress. The AI hardware cycle is real. Score at 68 — not higher because beat-and-drop persists outside semis, and Mag 5 next week is the decisive test. If Mag 5 beats and rallies, score goes to 75+.
reason.zh: 分数从 62 升至 68。Intel 创 1987 年以来最佳单日（+23.65%），AMD +13.91%，NVIDIA +4.33%——AI 硬件需求得到验证。整体 beat rate 88%，平均超幅 +13%，NTM EPS 上修 +1.1%，全年增长共识上调至 18%。信用利差（HY OAS 285bps）处于 2021 年低点，确认无信用压力。AI 硬件周期是真实的。分数 68——未更高，因为非半导体领域 beat and drop 持续，下周 Mag 5 是决定性测试。如果 Mag 5 beat 且上涨，分数升至 75+。

status.zh: 严重分化——大型科技驱动，非广泛上涨

reason.en: Score at 45 — breadth is the weakest link. Only ~57-58% of stocks above their 200DMA, below the critical 60% threshold. Dow Jones -0.4% for the week while S&P made new highs — non-confirmation. Russell 2000 only +0.4% for the week — small caps not participating. Equal-weight S&P significantly underperforming cap-weight S&P. The rally is driven by Intel/AMD/NVIDIA/Mag 5 — a handful of mega-cap tech stocks. Financials only 48.68% above 200DMA. This is not a healthy broad-based bull market. VIX at 18.71 at all-time highs confirms institutional caution.
reason.zh: 分数 45——广度是最薄弱的环节。仅约 57-58% 的股票在 200 日均线上方，低于关键的 60% 门槛。道琼斯本周 -0.4%，而 S&P 创新高——不确认。Russell 2000 本周仅 +0.4%——小盘股不参与。等权重 S&P 显著落后市值加权 S&P。反弹由 Intel/AMD/NVIDIA/Mag 5 驱动——少数几只大型科技股。金融板块仅 48.68% 在 200 日均线上方。这不是健康的广泛牛市。历史新高时 VIX 18.71 确认机构谨慎。

status.en: Strong — Dual New Highs, But Extreme Divergences
status.zh: 强势——双创新高，但背离极端

reason.en: Score improved from 60 to 72. S&P 500 at 7,165.08 all-time high (estimated 7,251 on 4/25), Nasdaq at 24,836.60 all-time high. S&P has recovered ~15% from the March lows. VIX declining to 18.71. Yield curve normalizing: 10Y ~4.29%, 2Y ~3.56%. Oil retreating: WTI $94.40 (-1.51%), Brent $99.13. Gold at $4,740.90 all-time high. Credit at 2021 lows (HY OAS 285bps). Score at 72 — strong price action. Not higher because VIX 18.71 at all-time high is a divergence, Dow lagging, and a fake news flash crash this week revealed market fragility.
reason.zh: 分数从 60 升至 72。S&P 500 历史新高 7,165.08（4/25 估约 7,251），Nasdaq 历史新高 24,836.60。S&P 从 3 月低点反弹约 15%。VIX 降至 18.71。收益率曲线正常化：10Y 约 4.29%，2Y 约 3.56%。油价回落：WTI $94.40（-1.51%），Brent $99.13。黄金历史新高 $4,740.90。信用处于 2021 年低点（HY OAS 285bps）。分数 72——强劲的价格行动。未更高，因为历史新高时 VIX 18.71 是背离，道指落后，本周假新闻引发闪崩揭示市场脆弱性。

trading_summary.en:
55.9 — Moderate. Liquidity's worst shock is behind us — TGA decelerating, repo lending zeroed out. Earnings are real: 88% beat rate, Intel's best day since 1987, NTM EPS revised up, full-year consensus rising to 18%. S&P/Nasdaq dual new highs. Credit at 2021 lows.

But breadth tells a different story: 57% below the 60% threshold, Dow lagging, equal-weight underperforming cap-weight. This is a selective rally driven by a handful of mega-cap tech stocks — not a broad bull market. A fake news flash crash this week revealed how fragile the market structure is.

55% position — participate but don't chase. Next week's Hyperscaler Blitz (Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta — 25% of S&P weight) decides everything. Beat and rally → conviction to 65+, add to 65%. Beat and drop → rally is done, reduce to 45%. Wait for the answer.
trading_summary.zh:
55.9 分，Moderate。流动性最猛烈的冲击已过——TGA 减速，repo lending 归零。盈利是真实的：88% beat rate，Intel 创 1987 年以来最佳单日，NTM EPS 上修，全年共识上调至 18%。S&P/Nasdaq 双创新高。信用处于 2021 年低点。

但广度在说另一个故事：57% 不到 60% 门槛，道指落后，等权重落后市值加权。这是少数大型科技股驱动的选择性反弹——不是全面牛市。本周假新闻引发闪崩揭示市场结构有多脆弱。

55% 仓位——参与但不追高。下周 Hyperscaler Blitz（Apple/Amazon/Alphabet/Microsoft/Meta——S&P 25% 权重）决定一切。Beat 且涨 → 确信度升至 65+，加仓至 65%。Beat and drop → 反弹到头，减至 45%。等结果。

trading_quote: The market is giving you two signals simultaneously: new highs and fragility. Both are true. The question is which one matters more next week.

note.en: All-time high — est. 7,251 on 4/25; ~15% recovery from March lows
note.zh: 历史新高——4/25 估约 7,251；从 3 月低点反弹约 15%

note.en: All-time high — Intel/AMD/NVIDIA driven; concentration extreme
note.zh: 历史新高——Intel/AMD/NVIDIA 驱动；集中度极端

note.en: Lagging — week -0.4%; did NOT confirm S&P/Nasdaq new highs
note.zh: 落后——本周 -0.4%；未确认 S&P/Nasdaq 新高

note.en: Week +0.4% — small caps not participating in the mega-cap rally
note.zh: 本周 +0.4%——小盘股未参与大型科技反弹

note.en: Yield curve normalizing — 10Y/2Y spread widening positively
note.zh: 收益率曲线正常化——10Y/2Y 利差正向扩大

note.en: Short-end falling — rate cut probability rising
note.zh: 短端下降——降息预期上升

note.en: Dollar easing — DOJ/Powell political risk removed
note.zh: 美元走软——DOJ/Powell 政治风险消除

note.en: All-time high — structural bull intact; central bank buying + geopolitical risk
note.zh: 历史新高——结构性看涨完整；央行购金 + 地缘政治风险

note.en: Retreating from highs — Hormuz risk premium easing slightly
note.zh: 从高点回落——Hormuz 风险溢价略微缓解

note.en: Near $100 — still elevated; inflation pressure persists
note.zh: 接近 $100——仍高位；通胀压力持续

note.en: Declining but elevated — 18.71 at all-time high is a divergence warning
note.zh: 下降但仍偏高——历史新高时 18.71 是背离警告

analysis.en: BTC +0.12% to $77,578 — modest stabilization after last week's divergence (BTC fell while S&P made new highs). ETH +0.05% to $2,318. The crypto market is cautiously recovering. Key support at $75,000 is holding. If Mag 5 earnings next week beat and rally, BTC should follow toward $80,000+. If Mag 5 disappoints, BTC could test $70,000-$72,000. The Fear & Greed Index at 52 (neutral) reflects the market's uncertainty. The structural bull case for BTC remains intact — institutional adoption, ETF flows, and the macro backdrop of dollar credibility concerns all support the long-term thesis.
analysis.zh: BTC +0.12% 至 $77,578——在上周背离（BTC 下跌而 S&P 创新高）后小幅企稳。ETH +0.05% 至 $2,318。加密货币市场谨慎回升。$75,000 关键支撑位守住。如果下周 Mag 5 财报 beat 且上涨，BTC 应跟随向 $80,000+ 迈进。如果 Mag 5 令人失望，BTC 可能测试 $70,000-$72,000。恐惧贪婪指数 52（中性）反映市场的不确定性。BTC 的结构性看涨逻辑完整——机构采用、ETF 资金流入和美元信誉担忧的宏观背景都支持长期论点。

gold_silver_note.en: All-time high — structural bull fully intact
gold_silver_note.zh: 历史新高——结构性看涨完全完整

key_driver.en: Central Bank Buying + Geopolitical Risk + Dollar Credibility Concerns
key_driver.zh: 央行购金 + 地缘政治风险 + 美元信誉担忧

key_driver_detail.en: All-time high at $4,740.90 — central bank buying + Hormuz risk + long-term dollar credibility concerns driving structural bull
key_driver_detail.zh: 历史新高 $4,740.90——央行购金 + Hormuz 风险 + 长期美元信誉担忧驱动结构性看涨

analysis.en: Gold +0.36% to $4,740.90 — all-time high. The structural bull case remains fully intact and is strengthening. Three pillars: (1) Central bank buying continues at record pace — de-dollarization trend accelerating. (2) Geopolitical risk — Hormuz mining order still in background, Middle East tensions elevated. (3) Dollar credibility concerns — DXY at 98.51, well below the 100 level that was considered 'normal' pre-2025. Gold is not selling off despite the equity rally — this is extremely bullish. The gold-silver ratio at 88.2 suggests silver remains relatively cheap. Key support: $4,600. Next resistance: $5,000 psychological level.
analysis.zh: 黄金 +0.36% 至 $4,740.90——历史新高。结构性看涨逻辑完全完整且在强化。三大支柱：（1）央行购金继续以创纪录速度进行——去美元化趋势加速。（2）地缘政治风险——Hormuz 布雷令仍在背景中，中东紧张局势高企。（3）美元信誉担忧——DXY 98.51，远低于 2025 年前被认为「正常」的 100 水平。尽管股市上涨，黄金没有下跌——这是极度看涨信号。金银比 88.2 表明白银相对便宜。关键支撑：$4,600。下一阻力：$5,000 心理关口。

description.en: Apple, Amazon, Alphabet, Microsoft, and Meta all report next week — collectively representing approximately 25% of S&P 500 market cap. Reuters calls it a 'pivotal week.' The binary outcome is stark: collective beat AND rally → composite score rises to 65+, position increases to 65%. Beat and drop (good numbers but stocks fall) → the rally is done, reduce to 45%. Intel and AMD validated AI hardware demand, but software misses (IBM, ServiceNow) and the beat-and-drop pattern spreading suggest enterprise spending may be bifurcating between hardware and software. The question is whether the Mag 5 confirm the AI hardware narrative or reveal broader demand weakness. This is the most important single week for the market in 2026.
description.zh: Apple、Amazon、Alphabet、Microsoft 和 Meta 全部在下周报告——合计约占 S&P 500 市值的 25%。Reuters 称之为「关键一周」。二元结果非常明确：集体 beat 且上涨 → 综合确信度升至 65+，仓位增至 65%。Beat and drop（数字好但股价跌）→ 反弹到头，减至 45%。Intel 和 AMD 验证了 AI 硬件需求，但软件 miss（IBM、ServiceNow）和 beat and drop 模式扩散表明企业支出可能在硬件和软件之间分化。问题是 Mag 5 是否确认 AI 硬件叙事，或揭示更广泛的需求疲软。这是 2026 年市场最重要的单周。

title.zh: 广度背离 + 闪崩脆弱性

description.en: S&P and Nasdaq at all-time highs, but: (1) Only ~57-58% of stocks above 200DMA — below the critical 60% threshold. (2) Dow Jones -0.4% for the week — did not confirm new highs. (3) Russell 2000 only +0.4% — small caps not participating. (4) Equal-weight S&P significantly underperforming cap-weight. (5) VIX at 18.71 at all-time high — institutions paying elevated premiums for downside protection. (6) A fake news flash crash this week caused a brief but violent market drop — revealing how fragile the market structure is. The Buffett Indicator and P/E above 28 indicate extreme valuations. This is not a healthy broad-based bull market.
description.zh: S&P 和 Nasdaq 创历史新高，但：（1）仅约 57-58% 的股票在 200 日均线上方——低于关键的 60% 门槛。（2）道琼斯本周 -0.4%——未确认新高。（3）Russell 2000 仅 +0.4%——小盘股不参与。（4）等权重 S&P 显著落后市值加权。（5）VIX 18.71 在历史新高时——机构为下行保护支付高溢价。（6）本周假新闻引发闪崩——揭示市场结构有多脆弱。Buffett 指标和 P/E 超 28 表明估值极端。这不是健康的广泛牛市。

title.zh: 流动性结构性逆风——3880 亿美元抽水未解决

description.en: Net liquidity at $5.700T — $388B below three weeks ago. TGA at $1.007T, bank reserves at $2.915T (below $3T threshold). Oil at $94.40 (WTI) / $99.13 (Brent) — still elevated near $100, maintaining inflation pressure and limiting Fed's rate cut window. The Hormuz mining order is still in the background. The structural tightening has not reversed — only decelerated. The mid-May TGA unwind is the catalyst to watch. Until net liquidity recovers toward $5.9T+, the structural headwind remains. The next H.4.1 data release is critical.
description.zh: 净流动性 5.700 万亿美元——比三周前低 3880 亿美元。TGA 1.007 万亿美元，银行准备金 2.915 万亿美元（低于 3 万亿美元门槛）。油价 $94.40（WTI）/ $99.13（Brent）——仍在 $100 附近高位，维持通胀压力并限制美联储降息窗口。Hormuz 布雷令仍在背景中。结构性紧缩尚未逆转——只是减速。5 月中旬 TGA 回落是要关注的催化剂。在净流动性回升至 5.9 万亿美元以上之前，结构性逆风持续。下一次 H.4.1 数据发布至关重要。

description.en: Five active divergences: (1) S&P/Nasdaq all-time highs but Dow -0.4% for the week — non-confirmation. (2) VIX 18.71 at S&P all-time high — institutions buying insurance at the top. (3) Breadth ~57% at index new highs — not broad-based. (4) Equal-weight S&P underperforming cap-weight — extreme concentration. (5) A fake news flash crash this week caused a brief violent drop — market structure is fragile. Beat-and-drop continues outside semis (Comcast -12.90%). The divergences are real warnings even as headline numbers look strong. The market is simultaneously at all-time highs and showing signs of fragility.
description.zh: 五重活跃背离：（1）S&P/Nasdaq 历史新高但道指本周 -0.4%——不确认。（2）VIX 18.71 与 S&P 历史新高背离——机构在顶部买保险。（3）广度约 57% 在指数新高时——非广泛上涨。（4）等权重 S&P 落后市值加权——极端集中度。（5）本周假新闻引发闪崩——市场结构脆弱。非半导体领域 beat and drop 持续（Comcast -12.90%）。即使标题数字看起来强劲，背离也是真实的警告。市场同时处于历史新高并显示脆弱迹象。

references.title: Market Data — SPX, NDX, DJI, BTC, Gold, VIX

disclaimer.en: Data sources: Yahoo Finance / FRED / U.S. Treasury / MacroMicro. For research purposes only, not investment advice.
disclaimer.zh: 数据来源：Yahoo Finance / FRED / 美国财政部 / MacroMicro。仅供研究，非投资建议。
